shortDesc.en: Procedurally-generated top-down shooter with rogue-lite elements.
shortDesc.es: Shooter desde arriba generado proceduralmente con elementos rogue-lite.

fullDesc.en:
## Overview

Void Signal is a top-down shooter built in Godot 4 that blends classic twin-stick shooting with procedural generation. Every run generates a new layout of interconnected rooms, enemy placements, and item distributions.

## Core Gameplay

Players navigate corrupted network nodes, defeating procedurally spawned enemies to collect data fragments. The run ends when the player either reaches the core and destroys it, or loses all health.

### Key Features

- Procedurally generated room layouts using BSP trees
- 20+ enemy types with individual behavior trees
- Run-based progression with persistent unlocks
- Dynamic difficulty scaling
- Full controller support

## Technical Highlights

The procedural generation system uses a custom BSP tree algorithm to guarantee connected rooms with no dead ends. Enemy AI uses lightweight behavior trees implemented natively in GDScript, keeping the game running at 120fps even with 80+ entities on screen.

## Development Notes

This was my first major release under Plants Path Collective. The full development cycle took 8 months, including two months of playtesting with a group of 15 external testers.
fullDesc.es:
## Descripción

Señal Vacía es un shooter desde arriba construido en Godot 4 que combina disparos clásicos con generación procedural. Cada partida genera un nuevo diseño de salas interconectadas, enemigos y objetos.

## Jugabilidad

Los jugadores navegan por nodos de red corruptos, derrotando enemigos generados proceduralmente para recopilar fragmentos de datos.

### Características Principales

- Generación procedural de salas con árboles BSP
- Más de 20 tipos de enemigos con árboles de comportamiento
- Progresión basada en partidas con desbloqueos persistentes
- Escalado de dificultad dinámico
- Soporte completo para mando

## Notas de Desarrollo

Este fue mi primer lanzamiento importante bajo Plants Path Collective. El ciclo de desarrollo completo tomó 8 meses.

shortDesc.en: A short narrative game about memory, loss, and fragmented identity.
shortDesc.es: Un juego narrativo corto sobre memoria, pérdida e identidad fragmentada.

fullDesc.en:
## Overview

Hollow Echo is a short narrative experience about a person piecing together their past through fragmented memories. Built in Unity over 3 months.

## Gameplay

Players explore a liminal space, collecting memory fragments that reveal an underlying story. Each interaction updates the world state in subtle ways.

### Key Features

- Custom dialogue system with branching logic
- Environmental storytelling
- ~45 minutes of content
- Original soundtrack

## Development

This project was my first serious attempt at narrative game design. I focused heavily on atmosphere and pacing over mechanics.
fullDesc.es:
## Descripción

Eco Vacío es una experiencia narrativa corta sobre una persona que reconstruye su pasado a través de memorias fragmentadas. Construido en Unity en 3 meses.

## Características

- Sistema de diálogo personalizado con lógica ramificada
- Narrativa ambiental
- ~45 minutos de contenido
- Banda sonora original

shortDesc.en: Turn-based grid puzzle with asynchronous multiplayer. In development.
shortDesc.es: Puzle de cuadrícula por turnos con multijugador asíncrono. En desarrollo.

fullDesc.en:
## Overview

Grid Protocol is an asynchronous multiplayer puzzle game where players compete to control nodes on a shared grid. Currently in active development as Plants Path Collective's next title.

## Core Mechanics

- Turn-based grid manipulation
- Asynchronous challenge system
- Leaderboards per weekly puzzle

## Status

Currently in early prototype phase. Target release: Q4 2025.
fullDesc.es:
## Descripción

Protocolo de Red es un juego de puzle multijugador asíncrono donde los jugadores compiten por controlar nodos en una cuadrícula compartida.

## Estado

Actualmente en fase de prototipo temprano. Lanzamiento objetivo: Q4 2025.

shortDesc.en: 48-hour game jam entry. A momentum-based platformer in a decaying city.
shortDesc.es: Entrega para game jam de 48 horas. Un plataformero basado en momentum.

fullDesc.en:
## Overview

Remnant Drift was built in 48 hours for the GMTK Game Jam 2023. It's a momentum-based platformer where you play as a courier navigating a collapsing city.

## Highlights

- Built entirely in 48 hours
- Momentum physics system from scratch
- Rated Top 5% in Innovation category
fullDesc.es:
## Descripción

Deriva Remanente fue construido en 48 horas para el GMTK Game Jam 2023. Es un plataformero basado en momentum.

## Destacados

- Construido en 48 horas
- Sistema de física de momentum desde cero
- Calificado en el Top 5% en la categoría Innovación
